name: Panopto
description: Panopto — enterprise video capture, editing, and management for orgs

seo.title: Panopto — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Panopto: Panopto — enterprise video capture, editing, and management for orgs

when_to_use: Enterprise video capture and management for universities
LMS-integrated lecture recording and indexing for students
Corporate training video libraries with search and analytics
Secure internal video distribution with access controls
Video quiz and engagement tools for eLearning platforms

pros: Category leader in lecture capture for higher ed
cons: UI feels dated vs modern video SaaS
review.verdict: Gold standard for university video — dominant in edu, misfit for developer-centric video needs.
review.best_for: Universities and training orgs running lecture capture at institutional scale.
review.not_for: Product teams embedding video in apps — use Mux, Cloudflare, or Vimeo.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

lock_in.reason: enterprise video platform, content migration complex
